query: SELECT MIN(wordCount) AS min_words, MAX(wordCount) AS max_words, ROUND(AVG(wordCount)) AS avg_words, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(publishedAt)) AS distinct_days FROM articles WHERE status='published';
